title: Scroll Witness Rail
prompt:
Create a production-ready Scroll Witness Rail using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Design a compact, self-contained reading rail for three evidence cards. The reader can use a native horizontal scroll region or the previous and next controls; the currently witnessed card changes a lime rail marker and announces its title. The component must show a meaningful state in a compact card as well as a wide detail preview, without requiring page-level scroll listeners. Use #F4F5F6 around a white Bento panel with #ECECEE borders, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 type, and #4A4A4F supporting text. Lime is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card or color-only progress.

Make the rail region focusable with a clear aria-label, use real buttons for previous and next, and announce the selected card in a polite live region. Buttons need 44px targets; click, Enter, and Space perform the same navigation. On keyboard focus in the rail, Arrow Left and Arrow Right should change cards. Animate the marker and card offset with a spring using stiffness 330 and damping 28; fade the status over 160ms. Do not use timers, random values, storage, remote assets, network calls, or uncleaned listeners. Use local deterministic state.

At 320px keep one card readable and controls available; at larger widths, show more breathing room but retain the simple rail. Keep AA contrast, a visible 3px dark focus ring, logical focus order, and state text. Prefer transform and opacity. Respect prefers-reduced-motion with instant movement or a 120ms fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
Context
*/ .uiwiki-witness{overflow-x:auto;scroll-snap-type:x mandatory;display:flex;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:16px}.uiwiki-witness article{min-width:100%;padding:16px;scroll-snap-align:start}.uiwiki-witness:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}.uiwiki-witness+button{min-height:44px;border:0;border-radius:12px;background:#111;color:#fff;font-weight:800}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-witness{scroll-behavior:auto}}
